name: haproxy
note: GPL-2.0+. Stock haproxy:2.9-alpine used as a TCP/SNI router on :443 (R1-1 / R1-2 in 2026-05-04 audit; landed in v0.0.33). Sniffs the SNI from each TLS ClientHello WITHOUT decrypting and TCP-forwards raw bytes to either caddy:8444 (panel subdomain) or sing-box:443 (proxy domain — NaiveProxy). No TLS termination here, so the on-the-wire fingerprint stays whatever the backend negotiates with the client (anti-tracking probe-resistance preserved). 2.9 is the latest LTS line — operator-friendly choice for a self-hosted deployment that may not get patched aggressively.
